question: S-047 plan review — Bybit Spot Margin on bybit_2 for VWAP true longs+shorts (Tier 3 multi-PR sprint, ~20h Claude + ≤30min operator)
summary: 2026-05-07 audit confirmed: VWAP signals fire every 15min, dispatch reaches bybit_2, but every sell refuses with below_min_balance because the today-#441 fix returns $0 BTC available on a USDT-only wallet. Operator directive: enable Spot Margin (isLeverage=1) so wallet holds USDT and opens long/short BTC spot positions, with RiskManager fully aware of margin/borrow fees/liquidation. PR #450 carries the diagnostic notebook + colab-workflows Rule 7 update + the S-047 sprint plan (7 checkpoints, 8 deliverables: ops notebook, accounts.yaml schema, RiskManager spot-margin sizing, exec.py + coordinator wiring, vwap.monitor close logic, reconciler spot-margin awareness, runbook). All deliverables are Tier 2/3, all draft, all ping-PR'd. T0 cannot start until this plan is merged/held. Smoke test plan included. Operator must also enable Spot Margin on the Bybit web UI before T1 starts (one toggle in Account → Margin Mode).

question: S-047 T1 (Tier 3) — declare bybit_2 spot-margin in routing config (PR #456)?
summary: D2 of S-047. config/accounts.yaml: bybit_2 market_type spot → spot-margin (extends existing routing field, no new is_leverage flag). src/units/accounts/risk.py: three new module-level defaults (max_borrow_btc=0.5, borrow_fee_apr_pct=10.0, liquidation_buffer_pct=30.0) exposed on RiskManager via config-dict-with-fallback — same surface as min_balance_usd / risk_pct. The label is identity, not a gate; dispatcher's live | dry_run remains the only canonical execution gate per workplan § Live / dry-run rule. T2 consumes the params; T3 consumes the label. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance check passes (no refuse-to-trade outside dispatcher; no per-account refusal flag; no operator-run notebook gate; live-mode invariant ✅; ruff/secret-scan/dry-run-in-diff/inventory clean; 21 new tests pass). Tier 3 — work-PR stays draft until operator merge reply.

question: S-047 T2 (Tier 3) — RiskManager spot-margin sizing kernel (PR #459)?
summary: D3 of S-047. RiskManager.position_size() upgraded with a spot-margin kernel: sizes from USDT collateral for both directions; max_borrow_btc as a sizing CAP; borrow_fee_apr_pct SCALES qty when daily fee accrual would bust the remaining daily-loss budget; liquidation_buffer_pct REFUSES (returns 0.0, same shape as min_balance_usd) when the SL distance violates the buffer relative to the liquidation distance implied by qty + USDT collateral. Long with no borrow (notional ≤ collateral) skips buffer — no leverage, no liquidation. Routing label passed as a primitive `market_type: str = "spot"` keyword arg; RiskManager does not inspect TradingAccount. Non-spot-margin sizing is bit-identical to pre-T2 contract (S-026 G2/G3 invariants pinned). 13 new tests across 3 classes; all pass. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance check ✅ (no refuse-to-trade outside dispatcher — zero-qty returns are existing risk-manager refusals; no per-account flag; no operator notebook; live-mode invariant clean; ruff/secret/dry-run/inventory clean). Tier 3 — work-PR stays DRAFT until operator merge reply gates T3.

title: S-047 T3 — exec + coordinator wiring (D4 + D5 land together)

question: S-047 T3 (Tier 2/3) — exec + coordinator spot-margin wiring (PR #464)?
summary: D4 + D5 of S-047 land together (one diff is incoherent without the other). D4: execute.py adds isLeverage=1 to every Bybit V5 spot place_order on bybit_2 (Buy + Sell + close legs); cash-spot accounts unchanged; existing spot-sell pre-flight base-coin guard SKIPPED for spot-margin (system can borrow). retCodes 110007/110095 flow through existing report_api_failure path — NO new gates. D5: coordinator returns USDT collateral as the balance for BOTH directions on spot-margin (cash-spot keeps direction-aware semantics); forwards market_type primitive to RiskManager.position_size so the T2 kernel actually fires. Fixes the live error operator just observed: bybit_2 Buy 0.002 BTC vs $177 USDT → 170131 (no isLeverage in kwargs). Operator side-quest (independent of this PR): flip the Bybit web-UI Spot Margin toggle on bybit_2 — until then, every isLeverage=1 order returns retCode 110007 server-side and is logged. Margin-agnostic — sprint does not block on the toggle. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance ✅: removes one refusal (spot-sell pre-flight for spot-margin), adds zero new gates; routing predicate not refusal flag; no operator notebook; live-mode clean; ruff/secret/dry-run/inventory clean; 25 new tests + 109 pre-existing related tests pass. Smoke harness scripts/sprint047/spot_margin_smoke.py runs against Bybit testnet (T6 territory). Tier 2/3 — DRAFT, never auto-merged, operator merge gates T4/T5/T6.

title: S-047 T4 — VWAP monitor close logic (TP/SL/VWAP-cross/time-decay)

question: S-047 T4 (Tier 3) — VWAP monitor close logic: close on TP/SL/VWAP-cross/time-decay (PR #469)?
summary: D6 of S-047. Replaces the v1 break-even-only stub in vwap.monitor() with four close paths plus the no-action path, in priority order: TP-cross (close >= tp for long, <= for short), SL-cross (close at/through sl), VWAP-cross (live VWAP recomputed each tick — once price crosses back through, the mean-reversion thesis has played out; skipped when tp == vwap_live so the more specific TP-cross reason wins), time-decay (open longer than cfg['monitor_hold_window_minutes'], default 240 min — operator-tunable in config/strategies.yaml). Verdict shape `{action: close, reason: str, exit_price: float}` is consumed by order_monitor._apply_update which calls close_open_position — the strategy unit never touches the exchange, preserving the pure-signal-generator architecture rule. Spot-margin path inherits T3 D4 wiring (isLeverage=1 + skipped pre-flight on bybit_2) so the new close paths flow through live without further changes. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance ✅ (no refuse-to-trade outside dispatcher; no per-account refusal flag; no operator notebook; live-mode invariant ✅; ruff/secret/dry-run/inventory clean; 27 new tests pass + 19 S-030-PR2 contract tests pass; pre-existing baseline failures unchanged vs main HEAD 1c69eb6). Hard guardrails ✅ (turtle_soup contract pinned by TestTurtleSoupUnaffected; bybit_1 + prop_velotrade_1 unaffected; no edits to forbidden runtime files). Tier 3 — work-PR DRAFT, never auto-merged, operator merge gates T5.

title: S-047 T4 closed — VWAP monitor closes on TP/SL/VWAP-cross/time-decay
summary: D6 of S-047 merged 2026-05-07. vwap.monitor() replaces the v1 break-even-only stub with four close paths plus the no-action path: TP-cross (close >= tp long / <= short), SL-cross (close at/through sl), VWAP-cross (live VWAP recomputed each tick — once price crosses back through, mean-reversion thesis has played out; skipped when tp == vwap_live so the more specific TP-cross reason wins), time-decay (open longer than cfg.monitor_hold_window_minutes, default 240 min — operator-tunable in config/strategies.yaml). Verdict-only — runtime layer translates to close_open_position via the linked trade row. Spot-margin path inherits T3 D4 wiring (isLeverage=1 + skipped pre-flight on bybit_2) so the new close paths flow through live without further changes. 27 new tests across 7 classes (TP-cross/SL-cross/VWAP-cross/time-decay/no-action/defensive/turtle-soup-unaffected). Hard guardrails ✅ — turtle_soup contract pinned by TestTurtleSoupUnaffected; bybit_1+prop_velotrade_1 unaffected; no edits to forbidden runtime files. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance ✅. T5 (reconciler spot-margin awareness) is the next session — will pause at operator-merge gate (Tier 2).

title: S-049 — spot-margin sizer correctness (UTA availableBalance + buy-side fee buffer)

question: S-049 (Tier 2/3) — spot-margin sizer correctness: UTA availableBalance + buy-side fee buffer (PR #473)?
summary: Closes the live recurrence of Bybit ErrCode 170131 on bybit_2 (operator surfaced mid-T4-session). Two distinct bugs in one diff: (A) buy side had no fee/headroom buffer (sell side has _SPOT_SELL_SAFETY_BUFFER=0.995; buy side had nothing); (B) sizer read walletBalance-locked per coin instead of UTA's availableBalance (= cash + availableToBorrow), so isLeverage=1 shipped with no leverage in the qty. Fix introduces the available_usd primitive end-to-end: collateral (free USDT cash) drives liquidation math (unchanged from T2); available_usd (collateral + USDT borrow capacity, less buy-side buffer) drives a new notional-vs-available cap in _apply_spot_margin_rules (rule 3). Falls back to balance_usd when the kwarg is missing → T2 contract bit-identical for non-spot-margin and cash-spot. coordinator.multi_account_execute builds available_usd = (quote_usdt + quote_borrow_usd) × _SPOT_BUY_SAFETY_BUFFER for spot-margin and threads it to the sizer. _fetch_spot_coin_balances gains base_borrow_usd/quote_borrow_usd fields (0.0 on cash-spot or margin off → backward-compatible). 14 new tests across 3 classes (TestAvailableUsdCap/TestFetchSpotCoinBalancesBorrow/TestBuySafetyBuffer); 1 existing T2 test updated (test_liquidation_buffer_violation_returns_zero now passes available_usd=2_000 so the new cap doesn't pre-empt the buffer rule under test). All 25 spot-margin tests pass. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance ✅ (cap is existing risk-manager refusal shape; no new gates; no notebook; live-mode invariant clean; ruff/secret/dry-run/inventory clean). Hard guardrails ✅ (bybit_1 + prop_velotrade_1 unaffected — cash-spot accounts get available_usd=None; T3 isLeverage=1 routing unchanged; T2 contract preserved when available_usd is None or == balance_usd). Tier 2/3 — work-PR DRAFT, never auto-merged, operator merge unblocks live trading on bybit_2.

title: S-049 closed — spot-margin sizer correctness shipped (UTA availableBalance + buy-side fee buffer)
summary: Closes the live recurrence of Bybit ErrCode 170131 on bybit_2 (operator-observed 16:02 UTC pre-merge). Two distinct sizing bugs fixed in one diff: (A) buy side gained _SPOT_BUY_SAFETY_BUFFER=0.995 mirroring sell-side fee headroom; (B) sizer now reads UTA availableToBorrow via new _fetch_spot_coin_balances fields (quote_borrow_usd/base_borrow_usd) — coordinator builds available_usd = (quote_usdt + quote_borrow_usd) × buffer and threads to RiskManager.position_size's new available_usd kwarg, where _apply_spot_margin_rules adds notional-vs-available cap as rule 3 (longs only — shorts use BTC borrow cap from rule 1). End-to-end distinction between collateral (free USDT, drives liquidation math; unchanged from T2) and available (collateral + USDT borrow capacity − fee buffer, drives notional cap). Falls back to balance_usd when available_usd missing → T2 contract bit-identical for non-spot-margin and cash-spot. 14 new tests + 1 T2 test updated; all 25 spot-margin tests pass. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance ✅. Hard guardrails ✅ (bybit_1 + prop_velotrade_1 unaffected — cash-spot accounts get available_usd=None; T3 isLeverage=1 routing unchanged). isLeverage=1 now ships with actual leverage in the qty. Next session: S-047 T5 (reconciler spot-margin awareness).

question: S-047 T5 (Tier 2) — reconciler spot-margin awareness (PR #477)?
summary: D7 of S-047. Teaches account_open_positions to recognise spot-margin accounts and synthesise exchange-side positions from the wallet snapshot, so the BUG-042 reconciler stops orphaning live bybit_2 trades on every tick. Synthesis rules (spot-margin only): COIN.borrowAmount > 0 → {symbol: <COIN>USDT, side: short, size: borrowAmount} (the borrow IS the position); COIN.walletBalance > 0 → {symbol: <COIN>USDT, side: long, size: walletBalance} (pragmatic — manual deposit or open leveraged buy both look identical, but reconciler's job is do-not-orphan-if-still-could-be-live, false negatives are safer than false positives per BUG-042 design); USDT itself excluded (quote coin, would emit phantom USDTUSDT row). Cash-spot keeps returning [] byte-for-byte and does NOT call get_wallet_balance (perf contract preserved). Linear/inverse paths unchanged. 13 new tests (synthesis × 8, cash-spot regression × 2, missing-creds/non-dict/unsupported × 3) all pass; 19 existing test_monitor_reconciler.py tests still pass. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance ✅ (reader not gate; routes by _is_spot_margin which reads existing market_type label; no notebook; live-mode invariant clean; ruff/secret/dry-run/inventory clean). Hard guardrails ✅ (bybit_1 + prop_velotrade_1 unchanged; linear/inverse path unchanged; missing-creds → None contract preserved). Tier 2 — work-PR DRAFT, never auto-merged, operator merge unblocks T6 (live smoke + runbook).

title: S-047 T5 closed — reconciler spot-margin awareness shipped
summary: D7 of S-047 merged 2026-05-07. clients.account_open_positions now synthesises spot-margin positions from the wallet snapshot: coin.borrowAmount > 0 → {symbol: <COIN>USDT, side: short}; coin.walletBalance > 0 → {symbol: <COIN>USDT, side: long}; USDT excluded (quote coin). Cash-spot returns [] byte-for-byte and does NOT call get_wallet_balance (perf preserved). 13 new tests across 3 classes (synthesis × 8, cash-spot regression × 2, missing-creds/non-dict/unsupported × 3) all pass; 19 existing test_monitor_reconciler.py tests still pass. § 4.4 5-bullet compliance ✅. Hard guardrails ✅ (bybit_1 + prop_velotrade_1 unchanged; linear/inverse path unchanged; missing-creds → None contract preserved). The BUG-042 reconciler now matches DB-open bybit_2 spot-margin trades against live exchange state instead of orphaning them every tick. Next session: S-047 T6 (end-to-end live smoke + runbook + bug-log close-references for BUG-046/048/049).
